calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustee, For Order Clarifying Title To Real P
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for and with Jacob Pelta (Petitioner).

Ms. Hinshaw provided clarification with regard to what properties and funds are in the Trusts (Exemption Trust/The Sabina Trust), how they are set up, which Charities in lieu of Pioneer Women are to receive the gifts, etc. The matter was taken under submission. Ms. Hinshaw will submit a revised order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
